name: proofpay-hashkey
description: Verifiable compliant settlement primitives for HashKey Chain, HSP, x402, and AI agents.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @proofpay/core && npm run build -w @proofpay/hashkey && npm run build -w @proofpay/http-middleware && npm run build -w @proofpay/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @proofpay/core && npm run build -w @proofpay/hashkey && npm run build -w @proofpay/http-middleware && npm run typecheck -w @proofpay/core && npm run typecheck -w @proofpay/hashkey && npm run typecheck -w @proofpay/http-middleware && npm run typecheck -w @proofpay/cli
